transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok píng tsú liân hâ Gue̍h kiat tì
man4 gwok3 bing2 zi2 nin4 haa4 jyut6 gat1 zi3
mín guó bǐng zi nián xiá yuè jí zhì

text.transcription: 歷代𩔰祖(考/妣)王公暨媽祖先靈祠

transliterations.transliteration: li̍k-tāi 𩔰 tsóo khó pí ông king 暨 mah tsóo-sian Lîng sī
lik6 doi6 𩔰zou2 haau2 bei2 wong4/wong6 gung1 kei3 maa1/maa2/maa5 zou2 sin1 leng4/ling4 ci4
lì dài 𩔰zǔ kǎo bǐ wáng gōng jì mā zǔ xiān líng cí

f.f86: [{id:'1',text:[{id:'t1',topicFocus:'topic',role:'loc',properties:{writingDirection:'t2br2l',backgroundColor:'red',side:'f'},transcription:'山前',transliteration:{pehOeJi:'Suann Tsîng',cantonese:'saan1 cin4',pinyin:'shān qián'}},{id:'t1',topicFocus:'focus',role:'date',properties:{dateMeaning:'',dateReference:'',calendar:'chineseLunar',decade:'',era:'',writingDirection:'t2br2l'},transcription:'民國甲戌年',transliteration:{pehOeJi:'Bîn-kok Kah 戌 liân',cantonese:'man4 gwok3 gaap3 seot1 nin4',pinyin:'mín guó jiǎ xū nián'}},{id:'t1',topicFocus:'focus',role:'person',properties:{dateMeaning:'',dateReference:'',calendar:'chineseLunar',decade:'',era:'',writingDirection:'t2br2l'},transcription:'顯考王公>諱蔴慈佳城',transliteration:{pehOeJi:'hián khó ông Kong 諱 蔴 Tsû kha siânn',cantonese:'hin2 haau2 wong4:wong6 gung1 wai5 maa4 ci4 gaai1 seng4:sing4',pinyin:'xiǎn kǎo wáng gōng huì má cí jiā chéng'}}]}]

transliterations.transliteration: hián khó ông Kong 諱 蔴 Tsû kha siânn
hin2 haau2 wong4/wong6 gung1 wai5 maa4 ci4 gaai1 seng4/sing4
xiǎn kǎo wáng gōng huì má cí jiā chéng
